title: Call of Duty Warzone Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Call of Duty Warzone (2020) is a acclaimed fps title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Navigate levels, manage ammo and health, and eliminate threats to progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Core battle royale zone shrink loop defines Call of Duty Warzone's identity.
mechanics.expression: Playable area contracts over time forcing squads into escalating firefights.

mechanics.map_notes: Core loadout customization loop defines Call of Duty Warzone's identity.
mechanics.expression: Pre-match gear and perk selection shapes combat identity and squad roles.

mechanics.map_notes: Core gulag revival duel loop defines Call of Duty Warzone's identity.
mechanics.expression: Eliminated players fight a 1v1 for a single redeploy back into the match.

mechanics.map_notes: Resource Gated Weapon supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: The character spends a resource such as ammo or energy to use special weapons, creating economy tension between primary and secondary attacks.

mechanics.map_notes: Environmental Hazard Navigation supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: A traversal mechanic in which the level space contains persistent damaging or lethal obstacles that the player must avoid through precise movement.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss Gated Progression supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: A progression structure in which access to subsequent content areas, abilities, or game states is conditionally locked behind the defeat of a designated boss.

mechanics.map_notes: Mid Level Checkpoint supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: A save point within a stage resets the player to that position on death rather than restarting the entire level.

mechanics.map_notes: Optional Content Layering supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: Hidden rooms, passages, or content zones exist off main paths, requiring players to investigate suspicious environments.

mechanics.map_notes: Telegraphed Threat Loop supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: A combat encounter structure in which an enemy signals an incoming attack through a distinct visual or audio cue before the attack resolves.

mechanics.map_notes: Multi Phase Boss Battle supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: A combat structure where boss encounters transition through discrete stages with distinct attack patterns, behaviors, or environmental conditions when health thresholds are reached.

mechanics.map_notes: Stealth Detection Loop supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: Enemy awareness meters, vision cones, or alert phases govern when combat or failure triggers.

mechanics.map_notes: Projectile Pattern Enemy Design supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: Enemies emit projectiles arranged in deterministic spatial formations such as spreads, spirals, rings, or waves that the player must navigate.

mechanics.map_notes: Health Capacity Upgrade supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: Permanent pickups or purchases extend the maximum health pool beyond the starting value.

mechanics.map_notes: Linear Stage Gauntlet supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: Progression moves through a fixed sequence of confined stages without hub backtracking.

mechanics.map_notes: Patterned Boss Encounter supports the main loop in Call of Duty Warzone.
mechanics.expression: A boss fight design in which the enemy executes a deterministic or semi-deterministic set of behaviors including telegraphed attacks and movement routines.

design_intent.player_fantasy: A fps experience centered on Call of Duty Warzone.
